α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
δ : Type u_4
inst✝⁴ : CommGroup α
inst✝³ : UniformSpace α
inst✝² : UniformGroup α
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace α
inst✝ : T0Space α
f : β → γ → α
h : Multipliable (uncurry f)
⊢ ∏' (c : γ) (b : β), f b c = ∏' (b : β) (c : γ), f b c

α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
δ : Type u_4
inst✝⁴ : CommGroup α
inst✝³ : UniformSpace α
inst✝² : UniformGroup α
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace α
inst✝ : T0Space α
f : β → γ → α
h : Multipliable (uncurry f)
⊢ (if h :
        Multipliable fun c =>
          if h : Multipliable fun b => f b c then
            if (mulSupport fun b => f b c).Finite then ∏ᶠ (b : β), f b c else Exists.choose h
          else 1 then
      if
          (mulSupport fun c =>
              if h : Multipliable fun b => f b c then
                if (mulSupport fun b => f b c).Finite then ∏ᶠ (b : β), f b c else Exists.choose h
              else 1).Finite then
        ∏ᶠ (c : γ),
          if h : Multipliable fun b => f b c then
            if (mulSupport fun b => f b c).Finite then ∏ᶠ (b : β), f b c else Exists.choose h
          else 1
      else Exists.choose h
    else 1) =
    if h :
        Multipliable fun b =>
          if h : Multipliable fun c => f b c then
